data.text/markdown:
Latent space study of the lung mappings

This notebook proposes an interactive way to explore the "high" dimensional (more than 3 components) latent space composing the lungs shapes database

Computing the latent space

We first compute the latent space using an SVD on the centered mappings (mappings from which both the reduced kinematics and the shape barycenter have been deduced)

console.name: stdout
console.text: High dim latent space coordinates saved to 'latent_space_data.csv'

data.text/markdown:
Plot the latent space in a ParallelCoordinates plot

Here we can easily to browse the "unfolded" latent space

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='SFPL-0' random-id='9928a76f-7d45-9383-07b1-3132fdaa4aa0'><marimo-slider data-initial-value='8' data-label='"<span class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"><span class=\"paragraph\">Number of modes</span></span>"' data-start='3' data-stop='15' data-step='1' data-steps='[]' data-debounce='false' data-disabled='false' data-orientation='"horizontal"' data-show-value='false' data-include-input='false' data-full-width='false'></marimo-slider></marimo-ui-element>
